para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes - ----- -----------------------------------------------. 1.00 ND 18/10/22 Common DP 2.1 tx only application for zcu102 and vcu118 1.01 ND 26/02/24 Added support for 13.5 and 20G 2.7 GM 01/05/26 Improved formatting.

briefdescription.para: This previous line rate to keep previous info to compare with new line rate request.
This function to convert integer to hex.
This function is a non-blocking UART return byte.
This function to get uart input from user.
